return(function(a,i,W,b,h,S,X,c,e,Y,r,R,U,u,d,f,P,M,G,l,N,C)e,M,C,c,r,R,G,f,U,d,N,P,u,Y,l=function(a,k)local i=l(k)local W=function()return r(a,{},k,i)end return W end,{},function(a,k)local i=l(k)local W=function(...)return r(a,{...},k,i)end return W end,function(a,k)local i=l(k)local W=function(W,b)return r(a,{W,b},k,i)end return W end,function(r,W,b,h)local lw={}local
